narrative: Currently a Recommendation Systems Engineer at Microsoft with six years of experience, this candidate brings product‑company exposure and solid ML background. The main reason for the ranking is strong verified skill depth, reflected in their work with OpenSearch, BM25 ranking models, and machine‑learning pipelines. They also show good breadth of technical skills across data engineering and model deployment, and a stable career path. However, platform engagement is modest and their JD‑relevant skill match score is below the pool average, while location and notice‑period uncertainty reduce immediate fit for the Pune/Noida role. Minor credibility concerns also temper confidence.
